creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
The cfengine* ports all set CONFLICTS similar to this

CONFLICTS=      cfengine-masterfiles3[0-9]-* cfengine-masterfiles31[1-9]-*
[...]
CONFLICTS=      cfengine-masterfiles[6-9]*

The first CONFLICTS is never used.  Either this is a problem and they
should be merged or the first CONFLICTS should be removed.
